Since people don't seem to report back - watched it in almost one go. The show is very good and the most exciting limited series I watched on Netflix in a long time. Seems the bad ratings on IMDb are due to one of the main characters being a non binary person, so don't let this stop you from watching. The series has great characters, looks awesome, has the soundtrack of my teenage years (hello The Vines 💛), Toni Collette's performance is excellent (as expected), most of the kids are super likeable and the show really makes you keep on watching. Each episode was awesome and kept peeling back layers of the past of the characters - very well written and I couldn't predict the ending (which was also good, was scared it wouldn't be). The only thing that bugged me was the communication between one of the main girls and Dempsey - it felt somehow superficial/lacked in depth when it held such importance. Otherwise highly recommended and best watched when dark outside. My favourite limited series (not a Netflix Original but on Netflix and more of an underdog) is The Serpent, btw.
